CREATE TABLE test_schema.table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
CREATE TABLE test_schema.table2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_schema.table1(id));
CREATE TABLE another_schema.table3 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
CREATE VIEW temp_schema.view1 AS SELECT * FROM test_schema.table1;
DROP SCHEMA temp_schema CASCADE IF EXISTS;
CREATE FUNCTION my_project.function1() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN NULL; END; $$ LANGUAGE SQL;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS my_project CASCADE;
